SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Apr-10-2013 Set For Trial On Apr-10-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 608

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-16-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Small Claims appeal calendar of 4-10-2013 - taken under submission as of 04-10-13 by Judge Wallace Douglass. Clerk: B. Paredes. Plaintiffs appearing by Ronald D. Foreman, Esq., Defendant present with Nathaniel Bigger, Esq. Plaintiff Ronald D. Foreman and defendant are sworn, examined and cross examined. Witness for plaintiff Samir Rohayem, sworn examined and cross examined. Witness for defendant Rory Sagy sworn and examined. Exhibits introduced by both parties and retained. Not reported. Dept. 608.

The following exhibits were received and introduced into evidence

Plaintiff's: #1 Declaration of Guy Hendel.
#2 Declaration of Diana Podrobinok in support of Respondent's Small Claims Judgment.
#3 Declaration of Irina Lerner in support of respondent's Small Claims Judgment.
